chapter_title.en: Chapter 46 – Inheritance of the lost (unknown whereabouts)

text: يُونُسُ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ قَالَ لِي أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) الْمَفْقُودُ يُتَرَبَّصُ بِمَالِهِ أَرْبَعَ سِنِينَ ثُمَّ يُقْسَمُ .

en.hubeali: Yunus, from Is’haq Bin Ammar who said,
‘Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘The lost, one should wait with his wealth for four years, then distribute it’.
